description: FlashAttention ROCm CK backend experiment for the local gfx1151 stack
divergence_notes: Uses the ROCm FlashAttention main_perf branch because the documented AMD CK and Triton backend paths live there.
Builds the CK extension with FLASH_ATTENTION_TRITON_AMD_ENABLE=FALSE, FLASH_ATTENTION_SKIP_CUDA_BUILD=FALSE, and GPU_ARCHS=gfx1151.
Carries the setup.py portion of ROCm/flash-attention branch matthias.gfx1151_ck commit 561341f7e0913fb7dd12c81d9e68501a5a847220 so CK accepts gfx1151 and codegen targets gfx11.

Checks out csrc/composable_kernel at commit 03ce21ddcbb75c5ac8630628a913d0b2ced4979a because that is the matching CK gitlink from the matthias.gfx1151_ck branch and contains gfx11 FMHA codegen factories.

Limits the CK package experiment to forward-only OPT_DIM=32 codegen with FLASH_ATTENTION_CK_GENERATORS=fwd, FLASH_ATTENTION_CK_FILTER='*fp16*nbias_nmask*ndropout*', and FLASH_ATTENTION_CK_FORWARD_ONLY=TRUE so direct qkvpacked and variable-length smokes can validate CK without compiling unused backward, paged-KV, dtype, mask, or dropout variants.
Adapts the FlashAttention CK forward wrapper to the newer CK fmha_fwd_args layout by filling no-scale/no-sink block-scale and descale fields with zero/null values.
Rejects paged-KV variable-length CK calls in the forward-only smoke build so the package does not link against omitted split-KV generated kernels.
Uses repo-owned python-amd-aiter-gfx1151, python-triton-gfx1151, and python-pytorch-opt-rocm-gfx1151 instead of letting setup.py install bundled or PyPI runtime pieces.
update_notes: Recheck the ROCm FlashAttention main_perf branch and CK-tile tags before bumping this package.

Keep direct flash_attn CK build/import, qkvpacked, and variable-length smokes as the first validation gate before any engine integration scenario; import and qkvpacked passed for 2.8.4-2 on 2026-04-23, and variable-length coverage starts with 2.8.4-4.
Keep the Triton AMD smoke explicit because runtime backend selection still depends on FLASH_ATTENTION_TRITON_AMD_ENABLE.
Treat FLASH_ATTENTION_TRITON_AMD_AUTOTUNE=TRUE as a performance follow-up, not part of the initial correctness gate.
